name: css-property-type-validator
description: Validate CSS custom property registrations and var() usages against @property syntax descriptors.
author: Schalk Neethling

scripts.check: vp check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm run build
scripts.update:vscode-data: pnpm --filter ./packages/vscode run sync:data && pnpm run format
scripts.example: pnpm run build && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js fixtures/imports/main.css
